reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the evidence vocabulary definition satisfied; do not infer every evidence item is sufficient or complete.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim defines spec vocabulary that is protected by spec lint and evidence-artifact audit rather than behavior eval.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by spec lint over the vocabulary page and by the evidence hash audit over checked-in evidence bundles that carry auditable command and file references.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep spec vocabulary, evidence-map pages, and evidence hash audit aligned when introducing new evidence source types.
